class_t Struct Reference

#include <class.h>

 Current class state.

 Numerical id in the class table.

 Primitive type for array classes.

 Number of dimensions for array classes.

 Class of the elements for arrays.

 Initializer thread.

 Number of reference fields in the instance.

 Number of instance fields.

uint32_t dtable_count
 Number of entries in the dispatch table.

Detailed Description

Structure representing a Java class
